summary: intake.py meets all AC: 11-step Questionary flow, general-tier follow-ups capped at 3, Rich summary, revise loop, 9-key dict; CLI flags pre-fill defaults; --skip-intake unaffected; 19 intake + 45 CLI tests pass. Fixed one minor doc drift in prompt frontmatter.

findings.description: intake_followup.md frontmatter declared model_tier: fast while the AC and intake.py call the general tier. Loader treats model_tier as metadata only (no routing impact), but the inconsistency was misleading. Updated frontmatter to general.
Summary panel renders time_cap as '{N}h' when N is an int — '1 week' (168h) shows as 'time=168h' rather than 'time=1 week'. Not a bug per spec; flagging for future polish.
_collect_followups already slices to MAX_FOLLOWUPS, and run_intake slices again with [:MAX_FOLLOWUPS]. Redundant but harmless.
